title: scNoiseMeter: platform-agnostic quantification of technical noise in single-cell RNA-seq
description: scNoiseMeter is a Python package that measures per-cell technical noise in single-cell RNA-seq from a coordinate-sorted BAM plus a GTF. It supports ONT, PacBio/Kinnex, and short-read (Illumina, ElemBio) data from 10x Genomics or BD Rhapsody kits, as well as Smart-seq / FLASH-seq plates (96-well and 384-well).
